infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
HEALTHY

All 10 collectors enabled and producing data. Single broker configured. No active portfolio models (no live trading). Market closed at 21:00 UTC (4 PM ET, Friday). Weekend gap expected until Monday 14:30 UTC.

## Collectors
| ID | Type | Symbol | Timeframe | Disabled | Data Fresh | Priority | Notes |
|----|------|--------|-----------|----------|------------|----------|-------|
| `[[collector/e5125995]]` | alpaca | GLD | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (89 bars) | Important | 10 active tasks depend on this. No gaps. |
| `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` | alpaca | XLE | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (87 bars) | Important | 3 active tasks. 2 minor after-hours gaps (20:45, 21:35). |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` | alpaca | ESTC | 5min | No | ⚠️ 20:00 UTC (67 bars) | Important | 2 active tasks. Data ends 1h before close (known Alpaca pattern). |
| `[[collector/35cf414b]]` | alpaca | ESTC | 15min | No | ⚠️ 20:00 UTC (23 bars) | Important | Consistent with 5min collector cutoff. |
| `[[collector/999b208d]]` | alpaca | SPY | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (89 bars) | Low | No active tasks. No gaps. |
| `[[collector/9c417caa]]` | alpaca | QQQ | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (89 bars) | Low | No active tasks. No gaps. |
| `[[collector/c00fd831]]` | alpaca | AAPL | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (89 bars) | Low | Only disabled task. No gaps. |
| `[[collector/3d04a943]]` | alpaca | NVDA | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (89 bars) | Low | Only disabled task. No gaps. |
| `[[collector/f60d4dce]]` | alpaca | IWM | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (88 bars) | Low | No active tasks. 1 minor after-hours gap (20:25). |
| `[[collector/2a8681ef]]` | alpaca | SLV | 5min | No | ✅ 21:50 UTC (89 bars) | Low | Only disabled task. No gaps. |

**Data coverage (14:30–21:50 UTC, full session + after-hours)**:
- ETFs/large-caps (GLD, SPY, QQQ, AAPL, NVDA, SLV): 89 bars each, complete through after-hours.
- XLE: 87 bars, 2 minor after-hours gaps (20:45-20:55, 21:35-21:45). Low volume periods.
- IWM: 88 bars, 1 minor after-hours gap (20:25-20:35). Low volume period.
- ESTC: 67 bars (5min) / 23 bars (15min), ends at 20:00 UTC. Consistent known Alpaca SIP pattern for lower-volume stocks.

## Brokers
| ID | Name | Type | Status | Notes |
|----|------|------|--------|-------|
| `[[broker/Alpaca Paper]]` (`ed622468`) | Alpaca Paper | alpaca | Configured | paper-api.alpaca.markets, SIP data feed |

## Portfolio
| Name | ID | Equity | Broker | Active Models | Status |
|------|-----|--------|--------|---------------|--------|
| `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` | `447e2d45` | $40,000 | `[[broker/Alpaca Paper]]` | 0 | Idle (no models deployed) |

## Active Optimization Tasks (by instrument)
| Instrument | Active Tasks | Disabled Tasks | Key Collector |
|------------|-------------|----------------|---------------|
| `[[instrument/GLD]]` | 10 | 2 | `[[collector/e5125995]]` |
| `[[instrument/XLE]]` | 3 | 0 | `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` |
| `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 2 | 8 | `[[collector/ab739989]]` / `[[collector/35cf414b]]` |
| `[[instrument/AAPL]]` | 0 | 1 | `[[collector/c00fd831]]` |
| `[[instrument/NVDA]]` | 0 | 1 | `[[collector/3d04a943]]` |
| `[[instrument/SLV]]` | 0 | 1 | `[[collector/2a8681ef]]` |

## Active Issues
| Component | Issue | Since | Impact | Action Taken |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|--------------|
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` / `[[collector/35cf414b]]` | ESTC data ends at 20:00 UTC daily (1h before market close) | At least 2026-03-09 | 2 active ESTC tasks missing final trading hour data | Monitoring — consistent Alpaca pattern, not collector failure. Tasks trained on this data pattern. |

## Resolved Issues (last 7 days)
| Component | Issue | Duration | Resolution |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------|
| — | No resolved issues in this period | — | — |

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## ⚠️ HEADLINE: Pipeline Stable at 3 Candidates (1/5) — EXP-26 Recalibrated Scorer Produces First Quality Model

No new evaluation cycle since 02:15Z. Pipeline standings unchanged. Key new finding: `[[model/26cc4684]]` (EXP-26 recalibrated scorer) IS DD **9.09%** ✅ with 811 ops — the recalibrated scorer is producing quality models with safe drawdown profiles. Early OOS test shows 30-day score of 0.39 (trade_count_factor suppressed), but positive expectancy ($4.72) and beats buy-and-hold (return_pct 1.23% vs B&H 1.00%).

**Next eval cycle: ~Mar 14 02:15Z.** This is the critical cycle — all 3 pipeline models need their second 16w ≥0.80.

## Ready for Promotion
| Rank | Model | Task | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Ops | WinRate | Backtest | Recommendation |
|------|-------|------|-------|--------|-------|------------|-----|---------|----------|----------------|
| *(none)* | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | All candidates at 1/5 consecutive. Earliest ~Mar 18. |

## Multi-Horizon Qualified Pipeline (16w ≥0.80 + 8w ≥0.60 + 4w ≥0.40 + IS DD <15%)

### #1: `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` 🏆 — PIPELINE LEADER (`[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21)

| Horizon | Score | Threshold | Pass? | Key Stats |
|---------|-------|-----------|-------|-----------|
| **16w** | **0.8096** | ≥0.80 | ✅ (1/5) | sharpe 10.29, DD 12.11%, cecpp 0.897, exp $24.90, ops 46 |
| **8w** | **0.7691** | ≥0.60 | ✅✅ | sharpe 8.14, DD 12.11%, cecpp 0.479, exp $23.22, ops 29 |
| **4w** | **0.6027** | ≥0.40 | ✅✅ | sharpe 5.25, DD 3.27%, cecpp **0.562**, exp $13.23, ops 20 |
| **1w** | 0.1240 | — | — | trade_count_factor suppressed (normal) |
| **IS DD** | **9.51%** | <15% | ✅ | 5.5% headroom |

**Why #1:** Best multi-horizon balance of any model. **4w cecpp 0.562** is significantly ahead of all others (~0.35). This means fc3af3fc is profiting consistently in the current regime, not just on a few lucky trades. 8w sharpe 8.14 is also the best.

### #2: `[[model/99f035df]]` — CROSSED 0.80 (`[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20)

| Horizon | Score | Threshold | Pass? | Key Stats |
|---------|-------|-----------|-------|-----------|
| **16w** | **0.8035** | ≥0.80 | ✅ (1/5) | sharpe 8.56, DD 9.31%, cecpp 0.887, exp $24.24, ops 47 |
| **8w** | **0.6257** | ≥0.60 | ✅ | sharpe 5.73, DD 9.31%, cecpp 0.389, exp $19.80, ops 31 |
| **4w** | **0.5367** | ≥0.40 | ✅ | sharpe 4.06, DD 5.30%, cecpp 0.361, exp $9.44, ops 20 |
| **1w** | 0.0423 | — | — | Dropped from 0.085 (monitor) |
| **IS DD** | **7.97%** | <15% | ✅⭐ | LOWEST pipeline IS DD |

**Caution:** 1w score halved (0.085→0.042). May indicate softening very-recent performance. Confirm at next eval.

### #3: `[[model/7376e292]]` 🆕 — STRONGEST DEBUT (`[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22)

| Horizon | Score | Threshold | Pass? | Key Stats |
|---------|-------|-----------|-------|-----------|
| **16w** | **0.8225** | ≥0.80 | ✅ (1/5) | sharpe 9.23, DD 8.72%, cecpp 0.883, exp $18.21, ops 58 |
| **8w** | **0.7193** | ≥0.60 | ✅✅ | sharpe 6.74, DD 8.72%, cecpp 0.379, exp $19.46, ops 32 |
| **4w** | **0.5372** | ≥0.40 | ✅ | sharpe 5.23, DD 5.50%, cecpp 0.352, exp $9.75, ops 22 |
| **1w** | 0.1056 | — | — | First eval |
| **IS DD** | **10.63%** | <15% | ✅ | 4.4% headroom |

**Risk:** First-eval inflation. EXP-22 fitness declining. Need second eval to confirm. Highest 16w debut score in platform history (0.8225) but one eval is meaningless without consistency.

## Held — Multi-Horizon Failure (16w ≥0.80 but short horizons fail)

| Model | Task | 16w | 8w | 4w | Consec ≥0.80 | Blocker |
|-------|------|-----|-----|-----|-------------|---------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` 💀 | EXP-14 | **0.8311** | **0.5756** ❌ | **0.3441** ❌ | 5/5 (held) | **TERMINAL:** 8w cecpp 0.405, freefall continues |
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | EXP-15 | **0.8016** | ~0.413 ❌ | ~0.063 ❌ | 2/5 | 4w/8w near-dead. Stale data only. |
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | EXP-11 | **0.8002** | ~0.590 ❌ | ~0.184 ❌ | 1/5 | IS DD 14.03% borderline + multi-horizon fail |

## IS DD Blocked (Score ≥0.80 but IS DD >15%)

| Model | Task | 16w | IS DD | Note |
|-------|------|-----|-------|------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | EXP-11 | **0.856** | 18.35% ❌ | Reference model. 8w dipped to 0.809 but stats still excellent (8w sharpe 14.71, cecpp 0.907). |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | EXP-14 | **0.813** | 19.27% ❌ | Permanently blocked. |

## Monitoring (Promising — Emerging Track)

| Model | Task | 16w Score | 16w Trend | 8w Stats | 4w Stats | IS DD | Assessment |
|-------|------|-----------|-----------|----------|----------|-------|------------|
| `[[model/fd60312c]]` ⭐ | EXP-17 | **0.765** (+2.2pp) | Accelerating ↑↑ | sharpe 5.54, cecpp 0.449, exp $17.55 | sharpe 3.24, cecpp 0.444, exp $7.16 | 8.34% ⭐⭐ | **CONSISTENT CLIMBER** — multi-horizon quality confirmed |
| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` | EXP-20 | **0.753** (+0.3pp) | **DECELERATING** ⚠️ | sharpe 5.03, cecpp 0.424, exp $13.25 | sharpe 2.84, cecpp 0.382, exp $6.26 | 8.93% ⭐ | Was +2.5pp, now +0.3pp. Plateauing? |
| `[[model/f601bbb5]]` | EXP-22 | **0.731** (+2.7pp) | Fast climb ↑↑ | sharpe 5.28, cecpp 0.412, 23 ops | **4w: sharpe 0.00, 9 ops** ⚠️ | 8.93% ⭐ | 16w climbing but 4w near-dead. Regime-dependent? |
| `[[model/3218f580]]` 🔥 | EXP-23 | **0.709** (+4.6pp) | Cliff jump ↑↑ | **8w: sharpe 0.00, 10 ops** ❌ | **4w: sharpe 0.00, 9 ops** ❌ | 7.13% ⭐⭐⭐ | **RED FLAG:** 16w climbing on historical data ONLY. 8w/4w dead. |
| `[[model/2d5307c8]]` | EXP-21 | **0.708** (0.0pp) | **STALLED** | sharpe 4.82, cecpp 0.424, exp $14.45 | sharpe 2.87, cecpp 0.444, exp $7.21 | 9.79% ✅ | Multi-horizon quality OK but 16w stuck |
| `[[model/977e04dd]]` | EXP-17 | **0.621** | Slow climb | — | — | 8.43% ⭐⭐ | Long road to 0.80 |

**Critical emerging model note:**
- **3218f580 reclassified to CAUTION.** Despite the lowest IS DD in platform history (7.13%) and impressive 16w cliff jumps (+4.6pp), its 8w and 4w scores are DEAD (sharpe 0.00, ~10 ops). The 16w climb is driven entirely by aging-out of bad data in the rolling window, not by recent performance. This model is NOT actively trading well. Remove from "fast track" candidate list.
- **f601bbb5 similar concern:** 4w sharpe 0.00, 9 ops. But 8w is still active (sharpe 5.28, 23 ops). More nuanced — may just be low recent frequency rather than dead.

## New Models This Cycle

| Model | Task | Optimizer Score | IS DD | IS Stats | Assessment |
|-------|------|----------------|-------|----------|------------|
| `[[model/26cc4684]]` 🆕⭐ | **EXP-26 (recalibrated GLD)** | **0.906** | **9.09%** ✅ | IS score 0.787, 811 ops, WR 56.9%, cecpp 0.875, sharpe 5.79, exp $1.53 | **BREAKTHROUGH:** First quality model from recalibrated scorer. IS DD safe. OOS 30d: score 0.39 (trade_count_factor), but exp $4.72 and beats B&H. |
| `[[model/0fb475b5]]` 🆕 | EXP-21 | 0.617 | **8.94%** ✅ | IS score 0.739, 271 ops, WR 63.1%, cecpp 0.915, sharpe 7.79, exp $6.28 | Good IS profile. EXP-21 safety streak continues. |
| `[[model/374cdefc]]` | EXP-23 | **0.846** | **14.07%** ⚠️ | IS score 0.749, 254 ops, WR 68.4%, cecpp 0.915, sharpe 8.65, exp $8.38 | Borderline IS DD (93.8% of limit). First 16w eval expected ~Mar 14 02:15Z. |

### New Capability: `return_pct` and `buy_hold_return`
PR #124 merged. These stats now available in evaluations. First observation: GLD buy_hold_return over IS period is 135% — all our models trade actively for far less total return, but with controlled drawdown. This confirms the models add value through risk management, not raw return.

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | 16w Score | 8w | 4w | 8w cecpp | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-----------|-----|-----|---------|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` 💀 | EXP-14 | 0.831 | **0.576 ❌** | 0.344 ❌ | **0.405** ↓↓ | No | **TERMINAL.** 8w cecpp confirms quality collapse. |
| `[[model/61694274]]` ↓↓ | EXP-10 | 0.785 ↓ | — | — | — | No | Terminal decline. Task disabled. |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | EXP-15 | 0.799 ↓ | — | — | — | No | Below 0.80. Track C broken. |
| `[[model/64a144a1]]` | EXP-13 ESTC | ~0.513 ↓ | — | — | — | No | ESTC deadline Mar 15. |

## GLD Regime Analysis

| Model | 16w | 8w cecpp | 4w cecpp | Current Regime Verdict |
|-------|-----|----------|----------|----------------------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.856 | **0.907** | 0.372 | Exception — 4w cecpp declining |
| `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` 🏆 | 0.810 | 0.479 | **0.562** ⭐ | **Best recent-regime adaptation** |
| `[[model/7376e292]]` | 0.823 | 0.379 | 0.352 | Good overall, moderate recent |
| `[[model/99f035df]]` | 0.804 | 0.389 | 0.361 | Adequate, 1w declining |
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` 💀 | 0.831 | **0.405** ↓ | 0.368 | Collapsed |

**Key insight:** The 4w cecpp numbers tell the real story. fc3af3fc (0.562) is the only model with consistent recent profitability. All others cluster around 0.35-0.37. The 4fc2c04e reference model's 4w cecpp (0.372) is in this cluster too — even the reference model's recent consistency has degraded despite its excellent 8w cecpp (0.907). This suggests the GLD regime shift is affecting all models at the 4w level, and fc3af3fc's resilience at 0.562 is genuinely exceptional.

## Summary
- **Total models surveyed**: 100
- **Above 16w promotion threshold (≥0.80)**: 8
- **Pass multi-horizon validation**: **3** ✅ (fc3af3fc, 99f035df, 7376e292)
- **Promotion candidates (consecutive counter)**: 3 (all at 1/5)
- **Permanently blocked (IS DD)**: 2 (4fc2c04e, 50c0ac0b)
- **Degrading models**: 4 (54b33aea terminal, 61694274 terminal, 289705b1 below 0.80, 64a144a1)
- **Emerging with potential**: 5 (fd60312c best bet, 001b9ef2, f601bbb5, 2d5307c8, 977e04dd)
- **Emerging reclassified**: 3218f580 downgraded (8w/4w dead despite 16w climb)
- **New models notable**: 3 (26cc4684 EXP-26 breakthrough, 0fb475b5 safe IS, 374cdefc borderline)

## Promotion Timeline

| Scenario | Model(s) | Earliest | Probability | Dependency |
|----------|----------|----------|-------------|------------|
| Pipeline trio sustains | fc3af3fc / 99f035df / 7376e292 | **Mar 18** | **40%** | Need 4 more consecutive ≥0.80 + multi-horizon holds |
| 7376e292 inflates then drops | 7376e292 | — | **20%** | First-eval inflation risk from EXP-22 |
| Emerging fast track | fd60312c | **Mar 22-25** | **15%** | Need to reach 0.80 + 5 evals |
| EXP-26 recalibrated produces pipeline model | 26cc4684 or new | **Mar 20+** | **10%** | Very early, needs 16w evals + maturation |
| No promotion by Mar 20 | — | — | **15%** | GLD regime worsens, pipeline models decay |

| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` | EXP-20 | 0.750 ↑ | 0.541 | Climbing | 8.93% | ~2-3 weeks |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100% ($40,000 equity)
- Models pending promotion: 0 (all held)
- Next promotion candidate: `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` (~Mar 18, if sustained + IS DD <15%)
- Pipeline depth: 2 multi-horizon qualified, 4 held, 5+ emerging

## Key Risk: GLD Regime Shift
All GLD models except `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` and `[[model/99f035df]]` show weak 4w/8w scores. The regime is differentiating models by their ability to adapt — the pipeline leaders are those thriving in current conditions, not relying on stale historical performance.

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## 🔬 HEADLINE: Recalibrated Scorer Experiments — Addressing Issue #121 + GLD Regime Shift Reality Check

**Major pivot this cycle.** The architect identified three structural issues with the scoring formula (Issue #121): sigmoid_scale ranges calibrated for GLD-bull-market only, dead-weight net_profit component, and unrealistic score ceiling for non-GLD. I've confirmed all three with model data and launched two experiments with a recalibrated formula.

Meanwhile, the analyst's multi-horizon analysis reveals ALL GLD models have weak 4w performance except `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (IS DD blocked). `[[model/54b33aea]]` promotion HELD — 30-day OOS validation failed (0.29 vs 0.83). No models currently pass full multi-horizon promotion criteria.

**Bright spots:** `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` (EXP-21) confirmed IS DD **9.51%** ✅ with IS score 0.767. New model `[[model/8bf64c49]]` (EXP-21) debuted at 0.565. EXP-21 (DD-weighted scorer) is the standout safety experiment.

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Best Fitness | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-------------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` (EXP-22: subgraph-xover) | graph | 0.417 | `[[model/7376e292]]` (16w: 0.759, IS DD TBD) | 4 | 7376e292 strong debut. Fitness still declining. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned) | graph | 0.645 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.856** RECORD, IS DD blocked) | 4 | Only model thriving in current GLD regime. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` (EXP-17: feat+baseline) | graph | 0.581 | `[[model/fd60312c]]` (16w: 0.743 ↑, DD **8.34%** ⭐) | 2 | LOWEST IS DD. 4w weak (0.238). |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` (EXP-20: pop=300) | graph | 0.401 | `[[model/99f035df]]` (16w: **0.790** 🆕, DD TBD) | 3+ | Near threshold! 001b9ef2 also climbing. |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` (EXP-21: DD-weighted) | graph | 0.547 ↑ | `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` (16w: 0.769, IS DD **9.51%** ✅ ⭐⭐) | 4 | **STANDOUT.** fc3af3fc has best IS profile. Fitness recovering! |
| `[[task/03255fc1]]` (EXP-23: cecpp scorer) | graph | 0.365 | `[[model/3218f580]]` (IS DD **7.13%** RECORD) | 4+ | Record low IS DD. Trade count cliff resolved. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III GLD) | graph | 0.510 | `[[model/198d0c1f]]` (16w: 0.806 ↑) | 5 | Bouncing. 4w near-zero ($0). Living on stale data. |

## New Experiments This Cycle 🆕

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| **`[[task/6e88f1c6]]` EXP-26** | **Recalibrated scorer on GLD.** sigmoid_scale sharpe [-1,8], sortino [-1.5,10], replaced net_profit with expectancy, added cecpp 15%. Addresses Issue #121. | **2026-03-13** | 🆕 Created |
| **`[[task/583f4d4b]]` EXP-27** | **Recalibrated scorer on XLE.** Same recalibrated formula. Should unlock XLE as competitive instrument. | **2026-03-13** | 🆕 Created |

### Recalibrated Scorer Formula (EXP-26/27)
```
(0.25*sigmoid_scale(sharpe_ratio, -1, 8)
+ 0.15*sigmoid_scale(sortino_ratio, -1.5, 10)
+ 0.20*(1 - max_drawdown/100)
+ 0.15*winners_vs_losers
+ 0.10*sigmoid_scale(expectancy, -2, 20)
+ 0.15*clamp(cecpp, 0, 1))
* trade_count_factor(num_operations, num_days, 40, 480, 120)
```

**Key changes:** Midpoint sharpe 3.5 (was 6.0), midpoint sortino 4.25 (was 6.25), expectancy replaces dead-weight net_profit, cecpp directly rewarded. This makes 0.80 achievable for strategies with sharpe 5+ and good quality metrics — currently impossible for non-GLD.

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. 🔬 Scoring Formula Miscalibration Confirmed (Issue #121)
The architect identified and I confirmed: sigmoid_scale(sharpe_ratio, -1, 13) makes sharpe 3-5 (excellent real-world) score near-zero. Only GLD-bull-market sharpe 10+ scores meaningfully. This explains why non-GLD instruments can't reach 0.80. Created EXP-26/27 with recalibrated ranges.

### 2. ⚠️ GLD Regime Shift — Multi-Horizon Analysis
All GLD models show weak 4w scores. Only `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (IS DD blocked) is thriving. `[[model/54b33aea]]` promotion HELD. The 16w rolling window is propped up by strong Dec-Jan data that's aging out. Emerging models (001b9ef2, fd60312c) show 16w climbing but 4w weakness.

### 3. ⭐ EXP-21 is the Standout Safety Experiment
`[[model/fc3af3fc]]` confirmed IS DD 9.51%, IS score 0.767, 385 ops, WR 62%. New model `[[model/8bf64c49]]` at 0.565. Task fitness RECOVERING (0.315→0.547). DD-weighted scorer on GLD is producing the best IS profiles.

### 4. 📈 EXP-20 Near Threshold
`[[model/99f035df]]` at 16w **0.790** — just 1 point below promotion threshold. If it holds, could be first to cross 0.80 from the safety track. IS DD TBD.

### 5. 🧹 Pruned Failed Experiments
Disabled EXP-19 (AAPL: 2 models, best 0.360) and EXP-10 (GLD baseline: 9 models, best declining). Freed 10 workers for new recalibrated scorer experiments.
